Home.title: SkillRadar | AI-Powered Tech Profile Optimizer
Home.description: Analyze your CV, match profiles with job requirements, and practice technical interviews. High-fidelity optimization for developers.
Home.heroTitle: Deconstruct and Optimize Your <bold>Tech Profile</bold> with AI
Home.heroSubtitle: Compare your CV against real job descriptions, close engineering skill gaps, and prepare for core mock interviews. Built by developers, for developers.
Home.feature1Desc: Instant breakdown of your CV structure. Extract skills, detect phrasing improvements, and calculate real ATS scores.
Home.feature2Desc: Match your stored CV analysis directly with raw Job Descriptions. Identify missing stack keywords and tech gaps.
Home.feature3Desc: Practice core questions tailored to your resume gaps using Google Gemini. Receive dynamic, structured feedback.

Auth.signUpSubtitle: Register to optimize your resume with artificial intelligence
Auth.signInSubtitle: Log in to your panel to find talent or evaluate your profile
Auth.separatorLogin: OR SIGN IN WITH YOUR ACCOUNT
Auth.agreePre: By continuing, you agree to our
Auth.roleSelectorDesc: To get started, we need to know if you are a Developer or a Recruiter.
Auth.forgotPasswordDesc: Enter your email and we will send you recovery instructions.
Auth.forgotPasswordSuccessMessage: We have sent a reset link to {email}. The link expires in 15 minutes.
Auth.invalidTokenDesc: The password reset token is missing from the URL.
Auth.successResetDesc: Your password has been securely reset.
Auth.successResetNext: You can now log in with your new credentials.
Auth.newPasswordDesc: Set a secure password for your account.

CareerCopilot.title: Career Copilot
CareerCopilot.subtitle: Powered by SkillRadar AI
CareerCopilot.welcome: Hello! I am your Career Copilot
CareerCopilot.descriptionDeveloper: Ask me about your resume, career advice, or how to prepare for interviews.
CareerCopilot.descriptionRecruiter: Ask me about job postings, candidates, or how to evaluate talent.
CareerCopilot.placeholderDeveloper: Ask me anything about your career...
CareerCopilot.placeholderRecruiter: Ask me anything about recruiting or candidates...
CareerCopilot.keyboardInstructions: Enter to send · Shift+Enter for new line

DashboardLayout.demoBanner: Navigating in <strongName>{mode}</strongName>. API and AI calls are securely simulated on the server.

PublicProfile.title: Professional Profile
PublicProfile.chartDesc: Estimated technical distribution based on professional history.
PublicProfile.githubDesc: Usage of programming languages in public repositories.
PublicProfile.topSkillsDesc: Technical skills validated through CV and real experience.
PublicProfile.ctaTitle: Are you a recruiter or developer?
PublicProfile.ctaDesc: Analyze your CV ATS compatibility and get an interactive visualization of your skills for free with SkillRadar.

Dashboard.uploadCvDesc: Diagnose and optimize your profile with AI. Upload your CV in PDF or TXT format to calculate your initial ATS score.
Dashboard.jobMatchDesc: Analyze your CV compatibility with real job offers. Copy and paste a job description for the AI to evaluate technical gaps.
Dashboard.mockInterviewDesc: Train your answers. Generate an interactive interview simulation session based on your profile's stacks and gaps.
Dashboard.historyDesc: Upload at least two versions of your CV in the CV Analysis tab to paint the historical optimization progress.
Dashboard.atsEvolutionDesc: Progression of your CV analysis score over time
Dashboard.nextRecommendedActionDesc: Next step to optimize your professional profile

CVAnalysis.title: CV Analysis
CVAnalysis.subtitle: Upload your CV and get AI-powered insights to improve your ATS score
CVAnalysis.readableToast: The uploaded PDF does not contain readable text (it might be a scanned image). Please use the section below to paste the raw text of your CV directly.
CVAnalysis.errorToast: An error occurred while processing the file.
CVAnalysis.unexpectedError: An unexpected error occurred while analyzing the CV.
CVAnalysis.detectedKeywordsDesc: Skills and technologies found in your CV
CVAnalysis.missingKeywordsDesc: Consider adding these to improve your score
CVAnalysis.aiSuggestionsDesc: Personalized recommendations to improve your CV
CVAnalysis.atsScoreExplainDesc: Qualitative breakdown of the AI's reasoning
CVAnalysis.uploadCvCardDesc: Upload your CV in PDF format or paste the content for analysis.
CVAnalysis.pasteCvPlaceholder: Paste the text here if the PDF upload fails...
CVAnalysis.uploadErrorUnexpected: An unexpected error occurred while uploading the file.
CVAnalysis.sizeLimitError: File exceeds the 4MB limit. Please upload a smaller file.

Progress.title: Progress
Progress.subtitle: CV optimization history, completed skills, and job matches evolution.
Progress.noHistoryDesc: Upload your first CV to analyze your ATS compatibility, get recommendations, and see how your score improves over time.
Progress.closedSkillsDesc: Skills that were missing in your first Job Match and that you have already added to your CV.
Progress.noClosedSkillsDesc: Closed skills will be calculated when you add new skills to your CV that previously marked as missing in your first analyses.
Progress.closedSkillsAchievement: Achievement! You have mastered {count} {count, plural, one {skill} other {skills}}
Progress.versionsDesc: List of uploaded CVs and their scores.

ResumeBuilder.title: AI Resume Builder
ResumeBuilder.subtitle: Edit your structured CV and optimize it with AI to be compatible with ATS.
ResumeBuilder.noExperienceCheckbox: I don't have formal work experience
ResumeBuilder.saveSuccess: CV saved and published to the Talent Pool successfully!
ResumeBuilder.addDetailsError: Please add experience or project details before analyzing.
ResumeBuilder.atsAnalysisDesc: AI evaluates if you are using active or result-oriented bullet points

Jobs.title: Job Board
Jobs.subtitle: Explore internal job offers on SkillRadar and check your AI-powered match score.
Jobs.noResumeWarning: You haven't uploaded a resume yet. Upload your CV in {link} to unlock automated Match Score calculation.
Jobs.searchPlaceholder: Search offers by title, company, or tags...
Jobs.noOffers: No offers found matching the filters.
Jobs.reportDescription: If you believe this job offer is spam, fraudulent, or violates the platform's terms, describe it here:
Jobs.reportPlaceholder: Describe the reason for your report...
Jobs.reportLengthError: The reason must be at least 5 characters long.
Jobs.reportSuccess: The report has been sent. We will review the content shortly.
Jobs.applySuccess: Successfully applied! The recruiter has been notified and the job has been added to your Kanban.

JobMatch.title: Job Match
JobMatch.description: Paste a job description to see how well your profile matches
JobMatch.noCvs: You haven't uploaded a resume yet. Please go to the {link} section to load your first CV.
JobMatch.jobDescriptionPlaceholder:
Paste the full job description here...

Example:
We are looking for a Senior Frontend Developer with 5+ years of experience...
JobMatch.strongCandidateDesc: Your profile aligns well with this position. Consider applying and highlighting your {skills} experience.
JobMatch.upskillingCandidateDesc: Focus on learning {skills} to improve your match score for similar positions.
JobMatch.smartPitchDesc: Generate a personalized and honest pitch for this offer, highlighting your immediate value and gaps.
JobMatch.pitchError: An error occurred while generating the pitch
JobMatch.matchError: An unexpected error occurred while analyzing the match.

JobTracker.title: Job Search Kanban Board
JobTracker.description: Drag and drop your applications to manage their stages
JobTracker.addAppDesc: Add the job offer details to start tracking it.

MockInterview.title: Mock Interview Simulator
MockInterview.description: Interactive practice tailored to your profile and CV
MockInterview.readyDescription: Select a mode and start your interview simulation.
MockInterview.sendInstruction: Press Enter to send, Shift+Enter for new line
MockInterview.welcomeMessage: Hello! Welcome to your mock technical interview. To begin, please tell me briefly about your general software engineering experience and what technologies you have recently mastered.
MockInterview.unexpectedError: An unexpected error occurred while starting.
MockInterview.qualitativeProgress: Generating your qualitative report and scores...
MockInterview.resultsDesc: Structured scores provided by the SkillRadar AI engine
